data.content:
Implementation Plan — terminateProcessGroup entry logging

Root cause: src/lib/agent-session-runtime.ts:310 terminateProcessGroup emits no
console log; three call sites produce silent SIGTERMs. Re-landing this fix for
"fake-fixed-already" tag.

Files to modify:
1. src/lib/agent-session-runtime.ts
   - Change signature to: terminateProcessGroup(child, reason: string, delayMs = 5000)
   - Add console.warn at entry with [terminal-manager] [terminate-process-group]
     tag, pid, reason, delayMs.
   - Add console.warn inside setTimeout SIGKILL branch with pid, reason,
     signal=SIGKILL, note forced after delayMs.

2. src/lib/agent-session-runtime-helpers.ts:304
   - Update call: terminateProcessGroup(child, "watchdog_timeout")

3. src/lib/terminal-manager.ts:464
   - Update call: terminateProcessGroup(entry.process, "external_abort")

4. src/lib/__tests__/agent-session-runtime-lifecycle.test.ts:456,474
   - Update existing calls to pass reason.
   - Add test asserting console.warn at entry with reason/pid/tag.
   - Add test asserting SIGKILL branch logs when timer fires.

Test strategy:
- Vitest spies on console.warn, assert call arguments match the format.
- Use vi.useFakeTimers to trigger the delayed SIGKILL branch.

Risks: none — Option B (breaking change with all callers internal) is clean.
All callers are in-repo and counted via grep.

Quality gates: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
